notes: Quality measurements transcribed from Meta's official Llama 3 / 3.1 model cards (pretrained, 5-shot MMLU macro and 25-shot ARC-Challenge unless otherwise noted). Sources: https://github.com/meta-llama/llama3/blob/main/MODEL_CARD.md and https://github.com/meta-llama/llama-models/blob/main/models/llama3_1/MODEL_CARD.md. n=1 (single published score, no variance reported).

results.provenance: Meta Llama 3 model card (pretrained, 8B). downstream_score alias = MMLU for the harness's quality_task bucket.
Meta Llama 3 model card (pretrained, 70B). downstream_score alias = MMLU for the harness's quality_task bucket.
Meta Llama 3.1 model card (pretrained, 8B). ARC-Challenge and CSQA omitted to demonstrate the harness flagging partial quality coverage.
